appDescription.message: Visual editor for LocalStorage and SessionStorage with JSON tree, search, import and export.

permissionDesc.message: To view and edit LocalStorage and SessionStorage of this page, allow DataSidekick to access only the current origin.

accessScopeNote.message: Access is valid only for this origin. Your data is not sent to external servers.

pendingAccessDesc.message: Allow access to this site to list the data.

noDataDesc.message: Choose a key to edit or import a JSON file.

readsActiveTab.message: Reads data from the active tab only.

hidesTrackers.message: Hides analytics, SDKs and common trackers.

showSizesDesc.message: Display value sizes in the list.

askBeforeDeleteDesc.message: Show confirmation before deleting keys or clearing all.

helpStep1.message: Open a page or local app in a Chrome tab.

helpStep2.message: Click DataSidekick to open the side panel.

helpStep3.message: Allow access to the current origin when prompted.

helpStep4.message: Choose between LocalStorage and SessionStorage at the top.

editDataDesc.message: Select a key from the list to open the editor. Valid JSON values appear as an editable tree; simple values appear as text.

editDataSave.message: After changing a value, click Save or use Ctrl+S / Cmd+S.

orgSearch.message: Use search to find keys or contents.

orgFavorite.message: Favorite important keys with the star icon.

orgHide.message: Hide noisy or specific keys from the list actions.

importExportDesc.message: Export generates a JSON file with origin metadata, storage type and current items. Import accepts this format or a simple key-value JSON object.

privacyDesc.message: DataSidekick runs locally in the browser. It reads and modifies storage only for the active tab, after you grant permission for that origin.

noHiddenKeys.message: No keys hidden on this origin

readingStaysFocused.message: Reading stays focused on the active tab for safety

storageNotAllowed.message: This page does not allow storage access. Use an http or https page.

storageAccessError.message: Could not access storage for this page.

typePrompt.message: Type: string, number, boolean, object, array, null

currentOriginTitle.message: Current origin of the active tab
